---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for OpenChimera
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of the problem or limitation you're encountering.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Which subsystem does this affect?

- [ ] Quantum Engine / Consensus
- [ ] Swarms / GodSwarm orchestrator
- [ ] Distributed Simulation (dist_sim)
- [ ] Core Kernel / EventBus
- [ ] MCP Server / Tool Runtime
- [ ] RAG / Query Engine
- [ ] API Server
- [ ] Rust chimera-core (PyO3)
- [ ] Plugins / Skills
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references about the feature request here.
